originalTitle: SpaceX Closes Up 19% — Secures MSCI, FTSE Fast-Track Index Inclusion
summary: FTSE said that SpaceX will be added to the Russell 1000, Russell Top 200 and other Russell US indexes effective after the market close on June 26.
content: MSCI said that it will add SpaceX to its standard and large-cap indexes, effective June 29.S&P Dow Jones Indices has ruled out SpaceX’s quick inclusion in the S&P 500.The company is still expected to be fast-tracked into the Nasdaq-100.After Elon Musk’s rocket manufacturing company SpaceX (SPCX) debuted on Nasdaq on Friday at a premium, major index providers FTSE Russell and MSCI added the company to key benchmarks.SPCX opened at around $150 on Friday — an 11% premium to the IPO price — and climbed as much as 30% higher in early trading, briefly pushing the company’s market capitalization above $2.2 trillion. The company closed its first day of trade up 19%.FTSE Russell Fast-Tracks AdditionFTSE Russell published a formal index notice on Friday confirming the immediate addition of SpaceX to the Russell US Index Series under its fast-entry rules. The notice states that SpaceX satisfies the fast-entry criteria following its IPO and will be added to the Russell 1000, Russell Top 200, and other Russell US indexes effective after the market close on June 26, 2026.The addition follows FTSE Russell’s May 2026 rule change, which allows large new listings that qualify for the Russell Top 500 to enter indexes after just five trading days, instead of waiting for the next quarterly reconstitution.MSCI Follows SuitMSCI also said that it will add SpaceX to its standard and large-cap indexes, effective June 29.This is in alignment with MSCI’s announcement earlier this month that SpaceX is expected to “easily clear” its size and free-float thresholds for early inclusion of large IPOs into its global standard indexes.These coordinated additions by FTSE Russell and MSCI will create near-term demand from trillions of dollars in passive funds tracking the indexes. These decisions contrast sharply with S&P Dow Jones Indices, which declined to adjust its criteria and has ruled out SpaceX’s quick inclusion in the S&P 500. S&P maintains requirements for four consecutive quarters of GAAP profitability and a longer seasoning period — criteria SpaceX does not currently meet.However, the company is still expected to be fast-tracked into the Nasdaq-100, which allows newly listed companies that rank in the top 40 by market capitalization to join the index after just 15 trading days under its new rules.On Stocktwits, retail sentiment around SPCX trended within the ‘extremely bullish’ territory, coupled with ‘extremely high’ message volume.Read More: HOOD Stock: Robinhood Buckles Under SpaceX IPO Demand, Users Report Trading IssuesFor updates and corrections, email newsroom[at]stocktwits[dot]com.
chineseTitle: SpaceX收盘上涨19%——确保纳入MSCI、富时快速通道指数
chineseSummary: 富时表示，SpaceX 将被纳入 Russell 1000、Russell Top 200 和其他 Russell US 指数，并于 6 月 26 日收盘后生效。
chineseContent: MSCI 表示将把 SpaceX 纳入其标准和大盘指数，6 月 29 日生效。标普道琼斯指数已排除 SpaceX 快速纳入标普 500 指数的可能性。该公司仍有望快速进入纳斯达克 100 指数。埃隆·马斯克旗下的火箭制造公司 SpaceX (SPCX) 周五在纳斯达克溢价上市后，主要指数提供商富时罗素和 MSCI 将该公司纳入关键指数SPCX 周五开盘价约为 150 美元，较 IPO 价格溢价 11%，并在早盘交易中上涨了 30%，短暂推动该公司市值超过 2.2 万亿美元。该公司首日收盘上涨 19%。 富时罗素快速通道加入 富时罗素周五发布正式指数公告，确认根据其快速进入规则，立即将 SpaceX 纳入罗素美国指数系列。该通知指出，SpaceX 满足 IPO 后的快速进入标准，并将于 2026 年 6 月 26 日收盘后生效，被纳入罗素 1000 指数、罗素前 200 强和其他罗素美国指数。此次纳入是在富时罗素 2026 年 5 月规则变更之后，允许符合罗素前 500 强资格的大型新上市公司在短短五个交易日后即可进入指数，而无需等待下一个季度的季度报告。 MSCI 紧随其后 MSCI 还表示，将从 6 月 29 日起将 SpaceX 添加到其标准和大盘指数中。这与 MSCI 本月早些时候的声明一致，即 SpaceX 预计将“轻松清除”其规模和自由流通量门槛，以便尽早将大型 IPO 纳入其全球标准指数。富时罗素和 MSCI 的这些协调添加将为跟踪指数的数万亿美元被动基金创造近期需求。这些决定对比
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
